title: Resume a Windows Unicode file-watcher fix

events.text: Fix missed config reloads on Windows Chinese paths without adding a watcher dependency.
I suspect UTF-8 decoding corrupts the watched path.
The decoded path exactly matches C:\Users\dev\项目 空间\配置.json.
The event path differs only by drive-letter case, and the current comparison is case-sensitive.
src/watch-path.ts now uses Windows-aware comparison; unit tests pass, but the real watcher integration test is pending.
Keep POSIX comparison case-sensitive and add the Windows integration test next.

criticalConstraints.text: Do not add a watcher dependency.

objectiveAndState.text: Restore Windows reloads for Chinese paths; comparison code is changed and integration coverage is incomplete.

decisionsAndFailedAttempts.text: UTF-8 corruption was rejected because the decoded path matched exactly.
Use case-insensitive path comparison only on Windows.

completedAndPending.text: Windows-aware comparison and unit tests are complete; real watcher integration remains pending.

workspaceEvidence.text: src/watch-path.ts is modified and test/watch-windows.test.ts is new.

nextAction.text: Finish and run the Windows watcher integration test using the Chinese path.
